title: fuck ass karen
author: june
body:
yk what I hate the most? stuck up fucking retarded bitches who walks like they got a 3 ft metal rod stuck up their rectum, resting bitch face and a shitty ass lesbian haircut. these fucking dykes been taking turns squatting on my dick telling me how to fucking breath properly atp. 
I CANT DO SHIT RIGHT APPRENTALLY. like holy shit I was getting kicked out of a store and one of them fucking told me "stop walking like that" and on baby I genuinely wanted to prowl on her and slap the living shit out of her when she said that. HOW CAN A FUCKING PERSON WALK INCORRECTLY.
YOU GENUINELY LOOK LIKE A FUCKING PIGEON WALKING TRYING TO ACT ALL BUTCH

DONT EVENT GET ME STARTED WITH THEIR NASAL ASS RASPY VOICE LIKE HOLY SHIT.
